memoryArtifacts.headline: Guy II de Dampierre (1155-1216)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Guy II de Dampierre, mort le 18 janvier 1216, fut connétable de Champagne (1174-1216), seigneur de Dampierre, de Bourbon et de Montluçon.

Biographie

Né vers 1140, il était fils de Guillaume Ier, sei …

memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  Seigneur de Dampierre, St. Jsut and St. Dizier, 1170; Seigneur de Bourbon; Procurator of Auvergne; loyal fiefholder of the Seigneurie de Montlucon.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/CHAMP …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy II de Dampierre於1165年9月4日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，他的父親Guillaume Ier de Dampierre40歲，母親Ermengarde de Toucy40歲。他於1196年與Mathilde Ire de Bourbon結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1189年登記服兵役。他於1174年被列為lord of dampierre, saint-dizier and moëslains。他去世於1216年1月18日在法國洛易-吉黑布盧瓦享年50歲，埋葬在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy II de Dampierre于1165年9月4日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，他的父亲Guillaume Ier de Dampierre40岁，母亲Ermengarde de Toucy40岁。他于1196年与Mathilde Ire de Bourbon结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1189年登记服兵役。他于1174年被列为lord of dampierre, saint-dizier and moëslains。他去世于1216年1月18日在法国洛易-吉黑布盧瓦享年50岁，埋葬在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy II de Dampierre was born on 4 September 1165, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, his father, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, was 40 and his mother, Ermengarde de Toucy, was 40. He married Mathilde Ire de Bourbon in 1196. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1189. In 1174, at the age of 9, his occupation is listed as lord of dampierre, saint-dizier and moëslains. He died on 18 January 1216, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, at the age of 50, and was buried in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy II de Dampierre est né le 4 septembre 1165, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Toucy, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde Ire de Bourbon en 1196. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1189. En 1174, à l’âge de 9 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord of dampierre, saint-dizier and moëslains. Il est décédé le 18 janvier 1216, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy II de Dampierre am 4. September 1165 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume Ier de Dampierre 40 und seine Mutter Ermengarde de Toucy 40. Er hat 1196 Mathilde Ire de Bourbon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1189 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1174, als er 9 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord of dampierre, saint-dizier and moëslains aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Januar 1216 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich und wurde in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy II de Dampierre è nato il il 4 settembre 1165 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde de Toucy, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde Ire de Bourbon nel 1196. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1189. Nel 1174, all'età di 9 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord of dampierre, saint-dizier and moëslains. Morì il 18 gennaio 1216, nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy II de Dampierreが1165年9月4日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで生まれた時，父Guillaume Ier de Dampierreは40歳，母Ermengarde de Toucyは40歳であった。1196年にMathilde Ire de Bourbonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1189年に兵役登録をした。1174年，9歳の時，職業はlord of dampierre, saint-dizier and moëslainsと記録されている。彼は1216年1月18日にフランスロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで50歳で死去し，フランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy II de Dampierre(이)가 1165년 9월 4일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume Ier de Dampierre(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde de Toucy(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1196년 Mathilde Ire de Bourbon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1189년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1174년, 9세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord of dampierre, saint-dizier and moëslains이었다. 그는 1216년 1월 18일 프랑스 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에 묻혔다.

mn.4 SEP 1165–18 January 1216: 1165 оны Есдүгээр сарын 4–1216 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 18

pt.4 SEP 1165–18 January 1216: 4 de setembro de 1165–18 de janeiro de 1216
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy II de Dampierre nasceu em 4 de setembro de 1165, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Toucy, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde Ire de Bourbon em 1196. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1189. Em 1174, com 9 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord of dampierre, saint-dizier and moëslains. Ele faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1216, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, França, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy II de Dampierre родился 4 сентября 1165 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume Ier de Dampierre было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Toucy, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde Ire de Bourbon в 1196 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1189 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1174 году, в возрасте 9 лет, работал по профессии lord of dampierre, saint-dizier and moëslains. Он умер 18 января 1216 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, Франция в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция.

sm.from 1196 to 1216: mai le 1196 e o'o I le 1216

es.4 SEP 1165–18 January 1216: 4 de septiembre de 1165–18 de enero de 1216
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy II de Dampierre nació el 4 de septiembre de 1165, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Toucy, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Mathilde Ire de Bourbon en 1196. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1189. En 1174, a la edad de 9 años, su ocupación registrada era lord of dampierre, saint-dizier and moëslains. Murió el 18 de enero de 1216, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia.
